rule_text: ALL LIQUID-RETAINING STRUCTURES SHALL be PROVIDED with TWO COATS of BITUMINOUS COATING per the approved BoQ and relevant technical specifications.
source_clause: Volume II — Civil/Structural Design — Protective Coating (Liquid Retaining)
verification_method: PASS if BoQ line items include 2-coat bituminous coating for liquid-retaining structures. FAIL on single coat / missing line.

rule_text: ALL BELOW-GROUND structures (on EXTERNAL SURFACES in CONTACT WITH EARTH) SHALL be COATED with TWO COATS of BITUMINOUS COATING per the BoQ — UP TO GROUND LEVEL.
source_clause: Volume II — Civil/Structural Design — Below-Ground Coating
verification_method: PASS if BoQ + drawings show 2-coat coverage to GL. FAIL on partial coverage.

rule_text: ANCILLARY PROVISIONS for sewerage structures SHALL include (where applicable): (i) LADDER and AIR-VENT arrangements; (ii) BYPASS LINE and OVERFLOW LINE connections to NEAREST DRAIN; (iii) VENT provisions for ENCLOSED structures; (iv) SS-316 GRADE RAILINGS for safety; (v) DRAIN ARRANGEMENT pipelines from treatment units to OVERFLOW COLLECTION SUMP; (vi) MINIMUM 02 NOS LIFEBUOY safety arrangement for tanks of DEPTH > 1.5 m.
source_clause: Volume II — Ancillary Provisions and Fixtures
verification_method: PASS if drawings + BoQ enumerate all 6 ancillary items. FAIL on missing safety lifebuoys / SS-316 railings.

rule_text: ALL PUMPS installed under the project SHALL be PROVIDED with NON-RETURN VALVES (NRVs), PRESSURE MONITORING INSTRUMENTS and ALL NECESSARY ACCESSORIES.
verification_method: PASS if pump P&ID shows NRV + pressure gauges + accessories. FAIL on missing NRV.

rule_text: DESIGN SUBMISSIONS SHALL include COMPLETE DETAILED DESIGN / HYDRAULIC CALCULATIONS and DRAWINGS of FOUNDATIONS and SUPERSTRUCTURE — TOGETHER with GENERAL ARRANGEMENT (GA) DRAWINGS and EXPLANATORY SKETCHES. SEPARATE calculations for foundations OR superstructure submitted INDEPENDENT of each other SHALL be DEEMED INCOMPLETE and NOT ACCEPTED. Though no GA drawings of all units are required at bid stage, a SCHEMATIC LAYOUT / GAD SHALL be SUBMITTED ALONG WITH THE BID.
verification_method: PASS if bid includes schematic layout + GAD; subsequent design submissions are joint foundation+superstructure. FAIL on partial submissions.

rule_text: ALL DESIGNS SHALL be BASED on the LATEST INTERNATIONAL or INDIAN STANDARD (IS) SPECIFICATIONS or CODES OF PRACTICE. In case of any VARIATION/CONTRADICTION between IS Standards/Codes and the specifications in the bid document, the SPECIFICATIONS in the BID DOCUMENT SHALL be FOLLOWED.
verification_method: PASS if conflict-of-precedence rule explicit. FAIL if hierarchy ambiguous.
